mapper.select: SELECT code, code_name FROM common_code WHERE group_code = 'REPORT_REASON' AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( user_id, obj_id, obj_type, reason_code, status_code, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{objId}, #{objType}, #{reasonCode}, 'RECEIVED', NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT r.*, cc1.code_name AS reportStatus, cc2.code_name AS reportReason,
tn.title AS noteTitle, c.content AS commentContent
FROM report r
LEFT JOIN common_code cc1 ON r.status_code = cc1.code AND cc1.group_code = 'REPORT_STATUS' AND cc1.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc2 ON r.reason_code = cc2.code AND cc2.group_code = 'REPORT_REASON' AND cc2.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN tasting_note tn ON r.obj_type = 'NOTE' AND r.obj_id = tn.note_id
LEFT JOIN comment c ON r.obj_type = 'COMMENT' AND r.obj_id = c.comment_id
WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_deleted = 'N'
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
